检查以下任务完成度，完成的继续，没完成的立刻做：

1. /root/.openclaw/workspace/skills/ 下有没有新建的Skill文件？
   目标：公众号发布SOP、日报搜索策略、飞书API调用 各一个SKILL.md
   
2. /root/.openclaw/workspace/PROJECT_STATUS.md 有没有创建？

3. /root/.openclaw-003/workspace/memory/skill-hunter-log.md 有没有内容？003跑了没？

对每个未完成的任务，立刻执行，不要只报告。
执行完输出简短完成报告（不超过200字）。
Current time: Sunday, March 1st, 2026 — 12:55 PM (UTC)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: Let me check the status of these tasks quickly.

arguments.command: ls /root/.openclaw/workspace/skills/ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && ls /root/.openclaw/workspace/PROJECT_STATUS.md 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && cat /root/.openclaw-003/workspace/memory/skill-hunter-log.md 2>/dev/null || echo "NOT FOUND"
